subcodes.first_line: His Holiness Noah came, and with lamentation, humility and supplication called the servants unto the Self-Sufficient, the Most High. They rejected Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت نوح آمد و بنوحه و عجز و ابتهال عباد را بغنی متعال دعوت نمود ردش نمودند
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Noah
